markdownRemark.html:
Watcharapong (Diamond) Timklaypachara is an MD–MEng dual-degree candidate at Mahidol University with research interests in medical image analysis, Thai clinical natural language processing (NLP), and trustworthy artificial intelligence for healthcare. His work focuses on developing interpretable and clinically relevant AI systems that support medical decision-making and improve patient care.

For more information, visit his LinkedIn and GitHub.

frontmatter.title: Watcharapong Timklaypachara
